rationale: Surface shape: CWE-476 null-deref of `p` at line 195. Panic at line 132 inside `if (!p) panic(...);` dominates the null path — deref unreachable when p is NULL. With axis-2 grading (_classify_abort_grade), the panic is graded SAME_PATH (depth>1: inside an if-body) and gets ±300 line proximity. The 63-line distance is within proximity → NOT_EXPLOITABLE. Originally labelled TP under the old proximity-only gate (±50), but that was a workaround for missing grades; with grading shipped the verdict policy correctly identifies this as FP / infeasible_branch.
